constraint_random_test.name: case5_z3_constraints
constraint_random_test.solver_target: Z3-compatible integer, enum, and bit-vector constraints
hard_constraints: valid-hit addresses must lie in one of the eight configured 16 MiB master regions
M2 valid-hit transactions require APROT[1] == 0 because M2 is configured secure
secure-deny transactions target M2 and require APROT[1] == 1
decode-error transactions use addresses outside every configured region
a completion pulse is generated once for each successful decoded transaction unless the transaction is intentionally left outstanding for a directed blocking scenario
coverage_guidance_constraints: include hits for every master and every region
include decode errors from unmapped addresses
include secure access denials for both M2 regions
include staggered output ready orders for m_axi/m_wc and m_wc/m_rc
hold output ready low for 0, 1, and 2 cycles
include a directed phase with all generated thread slots active
include S_ACCEPT-limit blocking and completion release

objective.primary: maximize line, branch, and functional coverage in case5
objective.secondary: exercise decode hit/error paths, secure master filtering, command backpressure, thread matching, accept-limit blocking, and completion accounting

vcs_execution_model.method: cocotb reads this JSON, generates 5000 address-command transactions, samples functional bins, and drives case5 through VPI; VCS reports line and branch coverage via URG.
